roa.docketEntryComment: /JAVS/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMSOF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,//X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/GTWM/SA4:NORDSTROM RACK AT 555 9TH ST SF/SAORD/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOPU:ACM/
/CAL:ADMIN BENCH WARRANT RETURN AND SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/BWDNC/X:BAIL REMAINS AS $1500,/CONTD:ACM ICR AND TRAIL 21003932/DOP/
/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:HEARD IN DEPT 11/
